title: 皐月賞の後に・変えてやる

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Wow... Gold City really is so pretty. I was
mesmerized the whole time.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: But she's an awesome runner, too!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
I honestly thought she was all looks at first, but
she can run pretty well!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Man, this year's Classics sure have an interesting
lineup! I can't wait for the Derby!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Not bad, City! Off to a good start.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Soooo, why'm I just sittin' here watchin'?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Why'm I not out there too?!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Well, you do know, people are out there praising
my running this time.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: It seems changing tours was the right choice.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Some people were disappointed, but because of
that, they're now paying attention to my skill.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: If I keep running like this, I'll make it, right?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: They'll see the real me, not just some pretty doll!
choice_data_list:
Let's keep up this momentum and win the
Derby!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
That's right. If I become the Derby champion, I'll
be considered the best of my generation.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
choice_data_list:
We'll have to work thoroughly with what little
time we have left!

We'll have to work thoroughly with what little
time we have left!
